s-1.ptxt: PRECAUTION
DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
DRAIN BRAKE FLUID

item.ptxt: Stop the engine and depress the brake pedal several times until no vacuum is left in the brake booster.
If the brake fluid leaks onto any painted surface, wash off or remove the brake fluid completely.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR CLEANER CAP SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the mass air flow meter connector (*1).
Disconnect the purge VSV connector (*2).
Disconnect the 2 purge VSV vacuum hoses (*3).
Disconnect the purge line hose from the clamp (*4).
Disconnect the No. 2 ventilation hose from the air cleaner hose.
Lock the No. 1 air cleaner hose clamp, and then disconnect the No. 1 air cleaner hose from the throttle body.
Remove the 2 bolts and air cleaner cap.
Remove the air cleaner filter element from the air cleaner case.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE AIR CLEANER CASE SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the hose clamp.
Remove the 3 bolts and air cleaner case.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE WINDSHIELD WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and the front wiper arm and blade assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE WINDSHIELD WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and the front wiper arm and blade assembly RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the claw and remove the front fender to cowl side seal LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL RH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the claw and remove the front fender to cowl side seal RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL TOP VENTILATOR LOUVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips.
Disengage the 4 claws and remove the cowl top ventilator louver sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE WINDSHIELD WIPER LINK ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 4 bolts and the windshield wiper motor and link assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL TOP PANEL OUTER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts, 4 nuts and cowl top panel outer sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE BRAKE BOOSTER ASSEMBLY
REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the cowl side trim clip.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A> and the screw <B>.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt:
Remove the bolt and the screw or

.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 1 INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 2 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE INSTRUMENT CLUSTER FINISH PANEL

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips.
Disengage the guide and 4 claws, and then remove the instrument cluster finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws <E>.
Disconnect each connector and remove the combination meter assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws <R>.
Disconnect each connector and remove the combination meter assembly.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER PUSH ROD CLEVIS

s2.ptxt: Remove the clip and pin, and disconnect the push rod clevis from the clutch pedal.

s-1.ptxt: DRAIN BRAKE FLUID

atten3.ptxt: Wash brake fluid off immediately if it is spilled on any painted surface.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CLUTCH RESERVOIR TUBE

s2.ptxt: Using pliers, grip the claws of the clip and slide the clip to disconnect the tube from the clutch master cylinder.

atten4.ptxt: Use a container to catch the fluid.

s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CLUTCH LINE

s2.ptxt: Using SST, disconnect the clutch line.

atten4.ptxt: Use a container to catch the fluid.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and clutch master cylinder.
Remove the gasket from the clutch master cylinder assembly.
